hero.eyebrow: AN MCA THAT FITS YOUR JOB
hero.art_prompt: Sneha, a 24 year old Indian working woman in smart-casual, smiling as she studies coding on a laptop in the evening at home after work, warm lamp light, balanced and aspirational.

panels.narration: Sneha worked in IT support and wanted to move up.
panels.dialogue: I need a real tech degree.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha, 24, in smart-casual at a work desk with a laptop, capable but ambitious, modern workplace.

panels.narration: A full-time campus MCA meant quitting her job.
panels.dialogue: Do I give up my salary?
panels.img_prompt: Sneha looking torn, glancing between her office badge and a campus brochure, soft conflicted expression, tidy desk.

panels.narration: Then she found a recognised MCA she could do online.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha's face lighting up with relief at a laptop showing a 100% online MCA, warm glow, cosy home study corner in the evening.

panels.narration: Now she studies evenings and weekends, career intact.
panels.img_prompt: Sneha happily attending a weekend live online class on her laptop at home, notebook beside her, calm and confident, warm light.

turn.title: Why An Online MCA Just Works
points: Study 100% online, anytime, from your laptop. No campus, no commute.
Weekend live classes plus recordings, so learning fits around a full-time job.
The same UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ MCA, recognised for tech jobs and higher studies.
Just ₹1,60,000 for the full 2-year MCA (₹40,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.

testimonials.name: Sneha Menon
testimonials.quote: I earned my MCA without leaving IT support. Weekend classes and recordings made it possible.

testimonials.name: Sana Iqbal
testimonials.quote: The monthly EMI fit my salary and the schedule fit my life. It genuinely just worked.

testimonials.name: Divya Rao
testimonials.quote: A recognised degree earned online. My new tech employer accepted it without a second thought.

testimonials.name: Meena S
testimonials.quote: I studied around work and still graduated on time. That flexibility grew my tech career.

facts.v: 100% online, learn anytime with weekend live classes
0% interest EMI from about ₹6,667/month, or an education loan
UGC-entitled online MCA, NAAC A++ accredited
